news.title:
Kotak Institutional Equities highlights TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and Coforge as top IT sector picks despite muted Q4FY26 growth and constrained FY27 visibility.
TCS shows stable margins; Infosys expects 3-5% FY27 growth; Coforge leads Q4FY26 with 19.7% YoY growth; Tech Mahindra reports flat revenue but margin gains.
news.summary:
Kotak Institutional Equities highlights TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and Coforge as top IT sector picks despite muted Q4FY26 growth and constrained FY27 visibility.
TCS shows stable margins; Infosys expects 3-5% FY27 growth; Coforge leads Q4FY26 with 19.7% YoY growth; Tech Mahindra reports flat revenue but margin gains.

news.title:
Nifty recovers 550 points from lows on Thursday, ending positive despite headwinds like oil at $110 and Dow futures down 600 points.
IT stocks, led by Coforge and LTIMindtree, and Nifty Bank, backed by HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank, drove the recovery.
news.summary:
Nifty recovers 550 points from lows on Thursday, ending positive despite headwinds like oil at $110 and Dow futures down 600 points.
IT stocks, led by Coforge and LTIMindtree, and Nifty Bank, backed by HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank, drove the recovery.

news.title:
Coforge gains 3% amid weak markets after announcing a strategic partnership with Solstice Innovations for AI-driven P&C insurance tech.
The partnership will leverage Coforge's Forge X AI platform, boosting investor confidence and driving significant trading volumes.
news.summary:
Coforge gains 3% amid weak markets after announcing a strategic partnership with Solstice Innovations for AI-driven P&C insurance tech.
The partnership will leverage Coforge's Forge X AI platform, boosting investor confidence and driving significant trading volumes.

news.title:
IT stocks like HCL Tech, Coforge, and Persistent Systems rose 1-2% despite market sell-off.
Nifty IT gained 0.3% with 8 constituents up, while Sensex/Nifty fell over 1.4%.
news.summary:
IT stocks like HCL Tech, Coforge, and Persistent Systems rose 1-2% despite market sell-off.

news.title:
Coforge saw 4,408 call contracts at Rs 1,200 strike traded on 2 April 2026.
Stock closed at Rs 1,178.3, up 2.3%, signaling near-term directional interest.
news.summary:

news.title:
Dolat Capital sees IT sector valuations corrected; Infosys, LTIMindtree, and mid-tier players like Coforge, Persistent Systems, KPIT excel.
AI-led spending and execution-focused strategies to drive selective growth; mid-tier firms show 17-25% CAGR outperformance.
news.summary:

news.title:
Motilal Oswal recommends TCS, HCLTech, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, & Coforge ahead of Q4 results.
HCLTech, Tech Mahindra, and Coforge noted for resilience, growth, and strong execution by Motilal Oswal.
news.summary:

news.title:
Coforge secures RBI nod for $1B+ overseas investment for Encora acquisition.
Deal enhances Coforge's capabilities in cloud, AI, and global IT services market.
news.summary:

news.title:

Approval aligns with India's foreign exchange management regulations.

news.title:
Analysts on NDTV Profit's 'Ask Profit' suggest holding Coforge, selling Bharat Dynamics, and holding Canara Bank with specific levels.
Power Finance Corp. is in consolidation with a positive long-term view; rapid-fire tips include selling Paras Defence and adding ITC Hotels.
news.summary:

news.title:
Coforge Ltd informs NCLT has reserved the order on its merger with Cigniti Technologies.
Statutory authorities raised no objections; updates to follow upon receiving NCLT's order.
news.summary:
Coforge Ltd informs NCLT has reserved the order on its merger with Cigniti Technologies.

news.title:
Post-Accenture Q2, analysts see AI as growth enabler but not a demand revival driver for Indian IT.
Infosys, Mphasis, Coforge, and Wipro gain; selective stock picks advised amid geopolitical and macro concerns.
news.summary:
Post-Accenture Q2, analysts see AI as growth enabler but not a demand revival driver for Indian IT.

news.title:
Accenture's Q2 results show limited support for IT sector; Indian IT stocks, including Infosys, TCS, fell 1.5%-4%.
Brokerages remain cautious; Nomura prefers Infosys, Coforge, eClerx; TCS down 10% in March; AI seen as tailwind.
news.summary:
Accenture's Q2 results show limited support for IT sector; Indian IT stocks, including Infosys, TCS, fell 1.5%-4%.
Brokerages remain cautious; Nomura prefers Infosys, Coforge, eClerx; TCS down 10% in March; AI seen as tailwind.

news.title:
Mid-tier IT firms gain momentum in large deals, mitigating AI disruption fears.
Coforge secures $158M UK deal; Zensar and Mastek win $210M and $110M contracts, respectively.
news.summary:
Mid-tier IT firms gain momentum in large deals, mitigating AI disruption fears.

news.title:
Nifty IT index fell 2.3%, hitting near a 3-year low, with Wipro, Infosys, TCS among top losers.
Coforge plunged 5%; analysts highlight global demand concerns, FII selling, and geopolitical risks.
news.summary:

Coforge plunged 5%; analysts highlight global demand concerns, FII selling, and geopolitical risks.

Technical weakness and underperformance drive heavy put volumes across strike prices.

news.title:
Wipro remains flat at ₹201.19 after announcing a multi-year deal with US-based TruStage for tech modernization.
Muted stock reaction reflects cautious IT sector sentiment; Nifty IT index flat, Infosys and Coforge lagging.
news.summary:
Wipro remains flat at ₹201.19 after announcing a multi-year deal with US-based TruStage for tech modernization.

news.title:
Kotak cuts IT stock price targets by 15-28%, maintaining long-term relevance and terminal growth assumptions.
Preferred stocks include Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Coforge, and Hexaware; highest upside potential at 39% for Coforge.

Data Cosmos supports enterprises in BFSI, healthcare, retail, and more with cloud-native, GenAI-enabled solutions.
